name: Spec-Task
description: Structured task management with lifecycle enforcement. Provides 10 tools (config_merge, task_recall, task_create, task_transition, task_log, task_verify, task_resume, task_archive, checklist_update, checklist_status) and hooks (before_prompt_build, before_tool_call, tool_result_persist) for sub-agent compliance and checklist tracking.

enforceOnSubAgents.description: Whether to inject spec-task reminders for sub-agents (default: true)

interventionLevel.description: Controls when spec-task intervenes in agent workflow. Based on task decomposition leaf-node count. low=≥20, medium=≥10, high=≥3, always=unconditional. Default: high.
